title: Research the latest development in Digital Capitalism
description:
Research objective:
- What is the latest development in Digital Capitalism

Expected deliverable:
- Produce a concise research summary with the current findings, relevant sources, and the main implications.
- Distinguish established facts from interpretation or open questions.

Definition of done:
- The research question is clearly answered.
- The answer is grounded in identifiable sources or evidence.
- Open gaps, uncertainty, or next research steps are noted.

intake.brief: What is the latest development in Digital Capitalism?
intake.refinement_summary: Structured from the rough brief with the local fallback refiner for research work.

failure_reason: research-0001 completed but is missing handoff_notes. All agents must document what was done.

checklist.title: Define the research question and scope for research the latest development in digital capitalism
Collect the relevant sources, references, or comparison points
Synthesize the findings into concise conclusions and recommendations
Record the deliverable summary and any open questions in the task
